globalPromptPreferences.style: bright painterly fantasy merchant RPG interface, sunlit coastal trade world, ornate brass trim, parchment ledgers, carved dark wood, blue enamel plaques, polished collectible-game UI, compact readable PC game layout
globalPromptPreferences.avoid: wireframes, grayscale mockups, generic medieval app UI, flat placeholder boxes, modern dashboard styling, muddy dark-only palette, photorealistic UI chrome
globalPromptPreferences.background: transparent preferred; if impossible use solid pure #00FF00
globalPromptPreferences.text: avoid baked-in text except ornamental logo/title lockups explicitly requested

needs: 16:9 ornate gold screen border overlay corners and edges
top HUD resource strip with gold coin, blue gem, reputation crest, day/carry chips
main menu logo/title lockup matching docs/ui_parts/01-title-main-menu.png
inventory item cards in normal, selected, protected, disabled, rarity, and empty states
offer comparison meter and value plaques
search, category, sort, and bulk action bars matching docs/ui_parts/10-inventory-management.png
portrait frames and nameplates matching customer and barter screens
NPC roster rows with preference, stock, quest, selected, and hover states
local service icons and buttons for market hub
travel map marker states and route line states
modal shells for system, save/load, settings, search/filter, and item detail flows
